titleStmt.title: SII 6.1138: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 1138. (A.R. No. 358 of 1899). IN THE FIFTY-SECOND NICHE OF THE SAME VERANDAH.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śakavatsarē gajaviyat nētrakṣamāsammitē vaiśākhē daśamīdinē ravitithau śrīsiṁhyaśailēśituḥ . Agrē
nityamakhaṁḍḍabhāsuramahādīpārtthamatyuttamāḥ paṁcchāśat pramitā U dōhanavatīrggā lakṣaṇairllakṣitāḥ . 1 śrī
mānēṣa jayaṁttabhūpatisutō matsyānvayōddīpakaḥ śrīgōpāḷakavarddhanō guṇanidhirddāridravidrāvaṇaḥ . sākṣādvaiṣṇava
darśanaikaniratō vikhyātakīrttiḥ svayaṁ prādāt vāṁcchitadānakalpakatarustvāsūryyatārādhipaṁ . 2 matsyānvayamahī
bhartturarjjunasyānnabhūpatiḥ . Anujastasya dharmmōyaṁ varttatāṁ varddhatāmapi . 3 svasti śrī . śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1208 gunēṁṭṭi
vaiśākha śukla daśamiyu nādivāramunāṁḍu śrīnarasiṁhyanāthuni sannadhiyaṁddu nityamu nnakhaṁḍadīpamu
Ettuṭaku matsyavaṁśodbhava śrīnarasiṁhavardhdhanuṁḍaina Oḍavādi Arjjunadēvamahārājula tammuṁḍu Anna
marāju tamaku Āyuraiśvaryyābhivṛdhdha śrīvaiṣṇava śrīyunuṁggalva nēṁbai mōdālanu Icci śrībhaṁḍaramuna dī
padaṁḍḍunaku kālōcitamūlyamu veṭṭeṁgnāna Ī dharmmuvu ĀcaṁdrārkkasthāIgānu cellaṁggalayadi Ī dharmmuvu śrīvai
ṣṇava rakṣa . śatruṇāpi kṛtō dharmmaḥ pālanīyō manīṣibhiḥ śatrurēva hi śatruḥ syāddharmaśśatrurnna kasyacit . śrī
Eṟiyabōyani sahitamugā dhārāpūrvvakamu cēśi Iccitimi .
Digital edition of SII 6.1138 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
